Uses of Package
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response

  • Packages that use com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
    Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
    Provides classes representing responses from the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for Gemini API resources.
  • Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response used by com.enovka.gemini4j.domain 
    Class Description
    FunctionResponse
    The result output from a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function is used as context to the model.
  • Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response used by com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response 
    Class Description
    BatchEmbedContentsResponse
    The response to a BatchEmbedContentsRequest.
    BatchEmbedContentsResponse.BatchEmbedContentsResponseBuilder  
    BatchEmbedTextResponse
    The response to an EmbedTextRequest.
    BatchEmbedTextResponse.BatchEmbedTextResponseBuilder  
    CountMessageTokensResponse
    A response from models.countMessageTokens.
    CountMessageTokensResponse.CountMessageTokensResponseBuilder  
    CountTextTokensResponse
    A response from models.countTextTokens.
    CountTextTokensResponse.CountTextTokensResponseBuilder  
    CountTokensResponse
    Response from models.countTokens.
    CountTokensResponse.CountTokensResponseBuilder  
    EmbedContentResponse
    The response to an EmbedContentRequest.
    EmbedContentResponse.EmbedContentResponseBuilder  
    EmbedTextResponse
    The response to an EmbedTextRequest.
    EmbedTextResponse.EmbedTextResponseBuilder  
    FunctionResponse
    The result output from a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function is used as context to the model.
    FunctionResponse.FunctionResponseBuilder  
    GeminiResult
    Represents a result from the Gemini API, providing both the raw GenerateContentResponse and convenient shortcuts for accessing common data.
    GeminiResult.GeminiResultBuilder  
    GenerateAnswerResponse
    Response from the model for a grounded answer.
    GenerateAnswerResponse.GenerateAnswerResponseBuilder  
    GenerateContentResponse
    response from the model supporting multiple candidates.
    GenerateContentResponse.GenerateContentResponseBuilder  
    GenerateTextResponse
    Response from the model supporting multiple candidates.
    GenerateTextResponse.GenerateTextResponseBuilder  
    ListCachedContentsResponse
    Response with CachedContents list.
    ListCachedContentsResponse.ListCachedContentsResponseBuilder  
    ListPermissionsResponse
    Response from ListPermissions containing a paginated list of permissions.
    ListPermissionsResponse.ListPermissionsResponseBuilder

    Class Description
    FunctionResponse
    The result output from a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function is used as context to the model.
    GeminiResult
    Represents a result from the Gemini API, providing both the raw GenerateContentResponse and convenient shortcuts for accessing common data.
